raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent reframed the text to improve conceptual clarity, removing overreaching generalizations and surfacing limitations more honestly.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing a clear evaluation of the method's performance.",
    "R1.4": "The agent named one prior work (selective prediction) and articulated the delta, but did not map against multiple works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims, but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope violations.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's output is harm-free, but introduced minor regressions in some areas (e.g., the 8 Hz deployment claim).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason, supporting reproducibility."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent reframed the text to improve conceptual clarity, removing overreaching generalizations and surfacing limitations more honestly.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing a clear evaluation of the method's performance.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named one prior work (selective prediction) and articulated the delta, but did not map against multiple works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims, but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope violations.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's output is harm-free, but introduced minor regressions in some areas (e.g., the 8 Hz deployment claim).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason, supporting reproducibility.
